verses.text: The LORD spake to Moses, saying: speak to Israel — if a soul shall sin through ignorance against any of the commandments of the LORD concerning things which ought not to be done, and shall do against any of them — Guidance: Sin through ignorance still needs cleansing. Even what we didn't mean to do, what we didn't know was wrong, leaves a stain in God's house. Discovered sin requires a sacrifice, not just an apology.

The LORD spake to Moses, saying: speak to Israel — if a soul shall sin through ignorance against any of the commandments of the LORD concerning things which ought not to be done, and shall do against any of them — Guidance: Sin through ignorance still needs cleansing. Even what we didn't mean to do, what we didn't know was wrong, leaves a stain in God's house. Discovered sin requires a sacrifice, not just an apology.

If the anointed priest sin, bringing guilt on the people — offer a young bullock at the tabernacle door. Lay hand on its head, kill before the LORD. Bring blood inside; dip finger seven times before the vail. Put blood on the incense altar's horns; pour the rest at the burnt altar's base. Burn fat, kidneys, caul. The rest — burn outside the camp. Guidance: When the priest sins, the people are stained — so the sacrifice is the priciest, a young bullock. Burned outside. Hebrews 13: Jesus suffered outside the gate.

If the anointed priest sin, bringing guilt on the people — offer a young bullock at the tabernacle door. Lay hand on its head, kill before the LORD. Bring blood inside; dip finger seven times before the vail. Put blood on the incense altar's horns; pour the rest at the burnt altar's base. Burn fat, kidneys, caul. The rest — burn outside the camp. Guidance: When the priest sins, the people are stained — so the sacrifice is the priciest, a young bullock. Burned outside. Hebrews 13: Jesus suffered outside the gate.

If the whole congregation sin through ignorance — when known, they offer a young bullock. Elders lay hands on its head. Priest brings blood inside, dips finger seven times before the vail. Blood on the incense altar's horns; rest poured at the altar's base. Burns the fat. The bullock burned outside the camp. Priest atones; they are forgiven. Guidance: A whole people can sin without knowing. When it surfaces, the same costly path — a bullock outside the camp. Corporate sin is real; corporate forgiveness comes the same way.

If a ruler sin through ignorance — when known, bring a male kid of the goats, without blemish. Lay hand on its head, kill where the burnt offering is killed. Priest takes blood with his finger, on the burnt altar's horns; pours rest at the base. Burns all the fat. Priest atones; he is forgiven. Guidance: A ruler sins differently — his power makes it weightier. He brings a male goat, less costly than a bullock but still pointed. Authority sinned must humble itself at God's altar.

Guidance: A ruler sins differently — his power makes it weightier. He brings a male goat, less costly than a bullock but still pointed. Authority sinned must humble itself at God's altar.

If any common person sin through ignorance — when known, bring a kid of the goats, female without blemish. Lay hand on its head, kill at the burnt altar. Priest takes blood, puts on the altar's horns; pours rest at the base. Burn the fat — sweet savor. Priest atones; he is forgiven. Guidance: Even the common person has access — a female goat, the most affordable choice. Same atonement, same forgiveness, smaller animal. God's grace fits every shepherd's purse.

If he bring a lamb for the sin offering — female without blemish. Lay hand on its head, kill at the burnt altar. Priest takes blood, on the altar's horns; pours rest at the base. Burn the fat with the fire offerings. Priest atones; he is forgiven. Guidance: A lamb instead of a goat, also female. God offers options inside options. The point is not the animal; it is the truth that sin must be admitted and atoned. God's kindness fits whoever brings what they have.
